For Individuals & Families For Medicare For Providers For Brokers For Employers Search Español Search Menu For About Cigna Healthcare: Accreditation Contact Us Social Media Log in to myCigna For About Cigna Healthcare: Accreditation Contact Us Social Media For Individuals & Families For Medicare For Providers For Brokers For Employers Home About Cigna Healthcare About Cigna Healthcare We are an advocate for better health through every stage of life. Guiding customers through the health care system, we empower them with the information and insight they need to make the best choices for improving their health and vitality. As the health benefits provider of The Cigna Group ® , we serve customers and clients through our U.S. Employer, U.S. Government, and International Health businesses and engage with employers and their employees, as well as with consumers, brokers, consultants, and health care providers. 178 million+ customer relationships 1 172,000+ behavioral health providers treating children/adolescents 2 million+ relationships with health care providers, clinics, and facilities As of December 31, 2022 U.S. Employer Our U.S. Employer business serves the health care needs of more than 15M medical and more than 16M dental customers from over 37K public and private employer relationships. Medical Comprehensive, cost-efficient health care options with a wide array of benefits, including access to a large, national network of providers, mental health and wellness programs, spending accounts, and pharmacy coverage. Pharmacy Safe and convenient drug plans that provide access to specialty drugs and medications as well as home delivery, specialty medication care and support, and a network of thousands of retail pharmacies. Behavioral Health and Wellness Focusing on the whole person, mental health and wellness benefits provide access and referrals to licensed mental health providers, services, and resources within an extensive Behavioral Health Network. Vision Comprehensive vision plan offerings supported by one of the largest specialty networks of routine vision care professionals in the nation1. Dental Going beyond excellent dental coverage, over 17 million customers 2 choose from Cigna Healthcare dental plans because of lower deductibles, higher benefits, and coverage options that include vision and hearing all in one. Savings and Spending Accounts (HRA/HSA/FSA) Convenient employer-based spending accounts that help employees plan and save money for a wide variety of health care expenses. U.S. Government Individual and group prescription drug plans that serve more than 2.5 million customers. Individual and Family Plans Offering customers quality medical plan options with personalized health care support and low costs, as well as access to medical, vision, dental, and pharmacy insurance options. International Health We're the leader in serving needs of the globally mobile. Our workforce of over 13K employees serve around 9K employer and ~17M customer relationships. Individual and Family Plans Specializing in worldwide health insurance plans for globally mobile individuals that includes health care coverage, well-being services, and international travel support in over 200 countries and jurisdictions worldwide. Employer Plans Offering plans to small-sized enterprises, medium-sized enterprises, and large corporations for employees sent abroad or employers located abroad who are insuring their employees back home and want to provide them with personalized features like 24/7 multilingual support, whole-person health programs, and advanced digital tools. IGO and NGO Health Providing vital support to intergovernmental organizations (IGOs), non-government organizations (NGOs), and government employees in areas of conflict or countries with limited infrastructure during times of crisis, as well as during illness or injury. Learn More About Us Newsroom Careers with Cigna Healthcare Accreditation Social Media The Cigna Group 1 NetMinder. April 1, 2020. The Ignition Group makes no warranty regarding the performance of data and the results that would be obtained by using it. 2 Cigna Dental book of business, internal reporting as of May 2023. Group health insurance and health benefit plans are insured or administered by CHLIC, Connecticut General Life Insurance Company (CGLIC), or their affiliates (see a listing of the legal entities that insure or administer group HMO, dental HMO, and other products or services in your state). Accidental Injury, Critical Illness, and Hospital Care plans or insurance policies are distributed exclusively by or through operating subsidiaries of The Cigna Group, are administered by Cigna Health and Life Insurance Company, and are insured by either (i) Cigna Health and Life Insurance Company (Bloomfield, CT). The Cigna Healthcare name, logo, and other Cigna Healthcare marks are owned by The Cigna Group Intellectual Property, Inc. All insurance policies and group benefit plans contain exclusions and limitations. Individual and Family Plans Specializing in worldwide health insurance plans for globally mobile individuals that includes health care coverage, well-being services, and international travel support in over 200 countries and jurisdictions worldwide. Employer Plans Offering plans to small-sized enterprises, medium-sized enterprises, and large corporations for employees sent abroad or employers located abroad who are insuring their employees back home and want to provide them with personalized features like 24/7 multilingual support, whole-person health programs, and advanced digital tools. IGO and NGO Health Providing vital support to intergovernmental organizations (IGOs), non-government organizations (NGOs), and government employees in areas of conflict or countries with limited infrastructure during times of crisis, as well as during illness or injury. ## About Cigna Healthcare
We are an advocate for better health through every stage of life. Guiding customers through the health care system, we empower them with the information and insight they need to make the best choices for improving their health and vitality. As the health benefits provider of The Cigna Group ® , we serve customers and clients through our U.S. Employer, U.S. Government, and International Health businesses and engage with employers and their employees, as well as with consumers, brokers, consultants, and health care providers. 178 million+ customer relationships 1 172,000+ behavioral health providers treating children/adolescents 2 million+ relationships with health care providers, clinics, and facilities As of December 31, 2022

Vision Comprehensive vision plan offerings supported by one of the largest specialty networks of routine vision care professionals in the nation1. Dental Going beyond excellent dental coverage, over 17 million customers 2 choose from Cigna Healthcare dental plans because of lower deductibles, higher benefits, and coverage options that include vision and hearing all in one. 824711  8/24  Proficiency  of Language Assistance Services  
English  – ATTENTION:  If you speak  English,  free language  assistance  services are available to you. Appropriate 
auxiliary aids and services to provide information in accessible formats are also available free of charge. Call 1 -
800-244-6224 (TTY:  Dial 711) or speak to your provider.  
Spanish – ATENCIÓN:  Si habla español,  los servicios de  asistencia lingüística  gratuitos  están disponibles  para 
usted. También están disponibles  de forma gratuita  ayudas  y servicios auxiliares  adecuados  para proporcionar  
información en formatos accesibles. Llame al 1- 800-244-6224 (TTY: Marque 711) o hable con su proveedor.  
Chinese – 注意：如果您讲中文 ，我们提供免费的语言援助服务。适当的辅助设备和服务也可以免费提供 ，以提供无
障碍格式的信息。请拨打 1-800-244-6224（TTY ：拨打 711）或与您的服务提供者联系。  
Vietnamese – XIN LƯU Ý:  Nếu bạn nói tiếng Viet, dịch vụ hỗ trợ ngôn ngữ miễn phí có sẵn cho bạn. Các thiết bị 
và dịch vụ hỗ trợ phù hợ p để cung cấp thông tin ở  định dạ ng có th ể tiếp cận cũng có s ẵn miễn phí. G ọi số 
1-800-244-6224 (TTY:  Gọi 711) hoặc nói chuy ện với nhà cung  cấp của bạn). 
Korean  – 주의:  한국어를 사용하시는 경우,  무료 언어 지원 서비스가 제공됩니다.  접근 가능한  형식으로  정보를 
제공하기  위한 적절한  보조 기기 및 서비스도 무료로 제공됩니다.  1-800-244-6224 (TTY:  711 로 전화 ) 로 
전화하시거나 제공자에게  문의하십  시오 . 
Tagalog – PAUNAWA: Kung  ikaw ay nagsasalita ng Tagalog, ang mga libreng serbisyo  ng tulong sa wika ay 
magagamit para sa iyo. Ang mga angkop na pantulong  na kagamitan  at serbisyo  upang  magbigay  ng impormasyon 
sa mga naa-access na format ay magagamit din ng libre.  Tumawag sa 1- 800-244-6224 (TTY:  Tumawag sa 711) o 
makipag- usap sa iyong tagapagbigay.  
Russian – ВНИМАНИЕ : Если  вы говорите на русском , доступны  бесплатные услуги  языковой  помощи . Также  
бесплатно предоставляются  соответствующие  вспомогательные  средства  и услуги  для предоставления  
информации  в доступных  форматах . Позвоните по телефону  1-800-244-6224 (TTY: Наберите 711) или 
обратитесь  к вашему  провайдеру . 
 
- Arabic  ﺗﻧﺑﯾﮫ :إذا ﻛﻧت ﺗﺗﺣدث   اﻟﻌرﺑﯾﺔ،  ﺗﺗوﻓر  ﻟك  ﺧدﻣﺎت  اﻟﻣﺳﺎﻋدة   اﻟﻠﻐوﯾﺔ اﻟﻣﺟﺎﻧﯾﺔ .ﻛﻣﺎ  ﺗﺗوﻓر  أﯾﺿًﺎ   ﻣﺳﺎﻋدات   ﻗﺎﺑﻠﺔ  ﻟﻠوﺻول إﻟﯾﮭﺎ، وذﻟك ﻣﺟﺎﻧًﺎ  .اﺗﺻل ﺑﺎﻟرﻗم  
.أو ﺗﺣدث إﻟﻰ  ﻣﻘدم اﻟﺧدﻣﺔ   اﻟﺧﺎص  ﺑك) اطﻠب   711  (TTY: 6224-244-800-1 
French  Creole – ATANSYON:  Si ou pale Kreyòl  Ayisyen,  sèvis  asistans  lang gratis  yo disponib  pou ou. Ekipman 
ak sèvis adisyonèl  ki apwopriye pou bay enfòmasyon nan fòma  ki aksesib  yo disponib  tou gratis.  Rele 1-800-244-
6224 (TTY:  Rele 711) oswa pale ak founisè ou a.  
French – ATTENTION  : Si vous parlez français, des services d’assistance linguistique  gratuits sont  disponibles 
pour vous. Des  aides  et des services auxiliaires  appropriés  pour fournir  des informations  dans  des formats  
accessibles  sont également disponibles gratuitement.  Appelez le 1-800-244-6224 (TTY  : composez le 711) ou 
parlez à votre fournisseur.  
Portuguese  – ATENÇÃO:  Se você  fala português,  serviços gratuitos  de assistência linguística  estão disponíveis  
para você. Auxílios e serviços apropriados para fornecer informações em formatos acessíveis também estão 
disponíveis gratuitamente. Ligue para 1- 800-244-6224 (TTY: disque 711) ou fale com seu prestador de serviços.  
Polish – UWAGA: Jeśli mówisz po polsku, dostępne są bezpłatne usługi pomocy językowej. Odpowiednie 
pomoce i usługi wspierające w celu dostarczenia informacji w dostępnych formatach są również dostępne 
bezpłatnie. Zadzwoń pod numer 1- 800-244-6224 (TTY: wybierz 711) lub skontaktuj się ze swoim dostawcą usług.  
Japanese – 注意: 日本語を話す場合は、無料の言語支援サービスが利用できます。アクセス可能な形式で情報を
提供するための適切な補助機器やサービスも無料で利用できます。1 -800-244-6224（TTY: 711  にダイヤル）に電
話するか、提供者に話してください。 
Italian  – ATTENZIONE:  Se parli italiano,  sono disponibili  per te servizi  gratuiti  di assistenza  linguistica.  Sono  
disponibili gratuitamente anche ausili e servizi appropriati per fornire informazioni in formati accessibili. Chiama il 
numero  
1-800-244-6224 (TTY:  comporre il 711) o parla con il tuo fornitore.  
German – Achtung: Wenn Sie Deutsch sprechen, stehen Ihnen kostenlose Sprachassistenzdienste zur 
Verfügung. Geeignete  Hilfsmittel  und Dienste,  um Informationen in barrierefreien  Formaten bereitzustellen,  sind 
ebenfalls  kostenlos verfügbar. Rufen Sie 1- 800-244-6224 an (TTY: Wählen Sie 711) oder sprechen Sie mit Ihrem 
Anbieter.  
(Farsi) Persian -   ھﻣﭼﻧﯾن،   وﺳ  ﺎﯾل و ﺧدﻣﺎت  ﮐﻣﮑﯽ ﻣﻧﺎﺳب   ﺑرای  در   دﺳﺗرس اﺳت   .ﺧدﻣﺎت    راﯾﮕﺎن   ﮐﻣﮏ  زﺑﺎن  ﺑرای   ﺷﻣﺎ   ﺻﺣﺑت  ﻣﯽﮐﻧﯾ  د،   ﺗوﺟﮫ   :
اﮔر  ﺑﮫ ﻓﺎرﺳﯽ  ﺗﻣﺎس ﺑﮕﯾرﯾد ﯾﺎ ﺑﺎ )ﺷﻣﺎره  711   را ﺑﮕﯾرﯾد( TTY:   اراﺋﮫ اطﻼﻋﺎت  در ﻗﺎﻟﺑﮭﺎی  ﻗﺎﺑل دﺳﺗرس ﺑﮫ  دﺳﺗرسﺻورت راﯾﮕﺎن در    ھﺳﺗﻧد   .ﺑﺎ ﺷﻣﺎره    
1-800-244-6224   .  اراﺋﮫدھﻧده ﺧود ﺻﺣﺑت ﮐﻧﯾد

Para Individuos y familias Para Medicare Para Proveedores Para Agentes Para Empleadores Buscar English Buscar Menu Para acerca de Cigna Healthcare: Acreditación Comunícate con nosotras Redes sociales Ingresa a myCigna Para acerca de Cigna Healthcare: Acreditación Comunícate con nosotras Redes sociales Para Individuos y familias Para Medicare Para Proveedores Para Agentes Para Empleadores Inicio Acerca de Cigna Healthcare Acerca de Cigna Healthcare Promovemos una mejor salud en cada etapa de la vida. Guiamos a nuestros clientes a través del sistema de cuidado de la salud, brindándoles la información y el conocimiento que necesitan para tomar decisiones informadas para mejorar su salud y vitalidad. Como proveedor de beneficios de salud de The Cigna Group ® , brindamos servicios a clientes mediante a través de nuestras divisiones para empleadores de EE. UU., servicios gubernamentales de los EE. UU. y compañias de servicios de salud a nivel internacional, y trabajamos en colaboración con los empleadores y sus empleados, así como con consumidores, agentes, consultores y proveedores de cuidado de la salud. Más de 178 millones de relaciones con clientes 1 Más de 172,000 proveedores de salud del comportamiento que tratan a niños/adolescentes Más de 2 millones de relaciones con proveedores de cuidado de la salud, clínicas y establecimientos As of December 31, 2022 Empleadores de EE. UU. Nuestros servicios para empleadores de EE. UU. satisfacen las necesidades de cuidado de la salud de más de 15 millones de clientes de cuidado médico y más de 16 millones de clientes de cuidado dental, a través de más de 37 mil relaciones con empleadores públicos y privados. Cuidado médico Opciones de cuidado de la salud integral y asequible con una variedad de beneficios que incluyen acceso a una amplia red nacional de proveedores, programas de salud mental y bienestar, cuentas de gastos y cobertura de farmacia. Farmacia Planes de medicamentos seguros y convenientes que brindan acceso a medicamentos de especialidad y entrega a domicilio, apoyo y cuidado con medicamentos de especialidad y una red de miles de farmacias minoristas. Salud del comportamiento y bienestar Enfocados en la salud integral de las personas, los beneficios de salud mental y bienestar brindan acceso y referidos a recursos, servicios y proveedores certificados en salud mental dentro de una amplia red de salud del comportamiento. Cuidado de la visión Ofertas de planes de cobertura completa de la visión respaldados por una de las mayores redes especializadas de profesionales de cuidado de la visión de rutina del país1. Cuidado dental Más allá de una excelente cobertura dental, más de 17 millones de clientes 2 eligen los planes dentales de Cigna Healthcare porque tienen deducibles más bajos, mayores beneficios y opciones de cobertura que incluyen cuidado de la visión y audición combinados Cuentas de ahorros y gastos (HRA/HSA/FSA) Convenientes cuentas de gastos a través del plan del empleador que permiten a los empleados planificar y ahorrar dinero para una amplia variedad de gastos de cuidado de la salud. Gobierno de EE. UU. Planes de medicamentos recetados individuales y grupales que brindan servicios a más de 2.5 millones de clientes. Planes individuales y familiares Ofrecen a los clientes opciones de planes médicos de calidad con apoyo para el cuidado de la salud personalizado y costos bajos, así como acceso a opciones de farmacia, de cuidado médico, dental y de la visión. Salud internacional Somos líderes en satisfacer las necesidades de quienes viajan internacionalmente. Nuestra fuerza laboral de más de 13,000 empleados brinda servicios a aproximadamente 9,000 relaciones con empleadores y unas 17 millones de relaciones con clientes. Planes individuales y familiares Especializados en planes de seguro de salud a nivel mundial para personas que viajan internacionalmente e incluyen cobertura de cuidado de la salud, servicios de bienestar, apoyo para viajes internacionales en más de 200 países y jurisdicciones de todo el mundo. Planes del empleador Ofrecemos planes a pequeñas y medianas empresas, así como a grandes corporaciones, para empleados en el extranjero o empleadores que se encuentran en el extranjero que brindan seguros para sus empleados en su país de origen y desean proporcionarles características personalizadas, como asistencia multilingüe 24/7, programas de salud integral y herramientas digitales avanzadas. Salud para IGO y NGO Brinda apoyo vital a organizaciones intergubernamentales (IGO, sigla en inglés), organizaciones no gubernamentales (NGO, sigla en inglés) y empleados del gobierno en zonas de conflictos o países con infraestructura limitada en momentos de crisis, durante una enfermedad o una lesión. Más información sobre nosotros Sala de prensa Empleos en Cigna Healthcare Acreditación Redes sociales The Cigna Group 1 NetMinder. 1 de abril del 2020. The Ignition Group no otorga ninguna garantía sobre el rendimiento de los datos y los resultados que se pudieran obtener a partir de su uso. 2 Cigna Dental book of business, informes internos al mes de mayo del 2023. Sujeto a cambios. Quiero... Obtener una tarjeta ID Presentar un reclamo Ver mis reclamos y EOB Verificar la cobertura de mi plan Ver la lista de medicamentos con receta Buscar un médico, dentista o centro dentro de la red Buscar un formulario Buscar información del formulario de impuestos 1095-B Ver el Glosario de Cigna Healthcare Comunicarme con Cigna Healthcare Audiencias Individuos y familias Empleadores Agentes Proveedores Administradores externos Internacional Maneja tu cuenta Portal myCigna para miembros Portal para proveedores Cigna para empleadores Cigna para agentes Información sobre Cigna Healthcare Acerca de Cigna Healthcare Noticias de Cigna Healthcare Información de The Cigna Group The Cigna Group Sala de prensa Empleos Equidad en salud Informe del ESG Inversionistas Distribuidores ©2026 Cigna Healthcare. Todos los derechos reservados. Privacidad Términos de uso Avisos legales Divulgaciones sobre productos Nombres de la compañía Derechos de los clientes Accesibilidad Aviso sobre no discriminación Asistencia idiomática [PDF] Reportar fraude Mapa del sitio Aviso de privacidad de los datos de salud de los consumidores de Washington Preferencias de cookies Aviso legal Los planes individuales y familiares de seguro médico y dental están asegurados por Cigna Health and Life Insurance Company (CHLIC), Cigna HealthCare of Arizona, Inc., Cigna HealthCare of Florida, Inc., Cigna HealthCare of Georgia, Inc., Cigna HealthCare of Illinois, Inc., Cigna HealthCare of North Carolina, Inc. y Cigna HealthCare of Texas, Inc. Los planes de beneficios de salud y de seguro de salud de grupo están asegurados o administrados por CHLIC, Connecticut General Life Insurance Company (CGLIC) o sus afiliadas (puedes ver un listado de las entidades legales que aseguran o administran HMO para grupos, HMO dentales y otros productos o servicios en tu estado). Los planes o las pólizas de seguro por lesiones accidentales, enfermedades críticas y cuidado hospitalario son distribuidos exclusivamente por o a través de subsidiarias operativas de The Cigna Group, son administrados por Cigna Health and Life Insurance Company y están asegurados por (i) Cigna Health and Life Insurance Company (Bloomfield, CT). El nombre Cigna Healthcare, el logotipo y otras marcas de Cigna Healthcare son propiedad de The Cigna Group Intellectual Property, Inc. Todas las pólizas de seguros y los planes de beneficios grupales contienen exclusiones y limitaciones. Para conocer la disponibilidad, los costos y los detalles completos de la cobertura, comunícate con un agente autorizado o con un representante de ventas de Cigna Healthcare. Este sitio web no está dirigido a los residentes de New Mexico. Al seleccionar estos enlaces, saldrás de Cigna.com hacia otro sitio web que podría no ser un sitio web de Cigna Healthcare. Cigna Healthcare no puede controlar el contenido ni los enlaces de sitios web que no son de Cigna Healthcare. Detalles La aseguradora publica el formulario traducido para fines informativos y la versión en inglés prevalece para fines de solicitud e interpretación. The insurer is issuing the translated form on an informational basis and the English version is controlling for the purposes of application and interpretation.

## Acerca de Cigna Healthcare
Promovemos una mejor salud en cada etapa de la vida. Guiamos a nuestros clientes a través del sistema de cuidado de la salud, brindándoles la información y el conocimiento que necesitan para tomar decisiones informadas para mejorar su salud y vitalidad. Como proveedor de beneficios de salud de The Cigna Group ® , brindamos servicios a clientes mediante a través de nuestras divisiones para empleadores de EE. UU., servicios gubernamentales de los EE. UU. y compañias de servicios de salud a nivel internacional, y trabajamos en colaboración con los empleadores y sus empleados, así como con consumidores, agentes, consultores y proveedores de cuidado de la salud. Empleadores de EE. UU. Nuestros servicios para empleadores de EE. UU. satisfacen las necesidades de cuidado de la salud de más de 15 millones de clientes de cuidado médico y más de 16 millones de clientes de cuidado dental, a través de más de 37 mil relaciones con empleadores públicos y privados.
## Empleadores de EE. UU.
Nuestros servicios para empleadores de EE. UU. satisfacen las necesidades de cuidado de la salud de más de 15 millones de clientes de cuidado médico y más de 16 millones de clientes de cuidado dental, a través de más de 37 mil relaciones con empleadores públicos y privados.
Cuidado médico Opciones de cuidado de la salud integral y asequible con una variedad de beneficios que incluyen acceso a una amplia red nacional de proveedores, programas de salud mental y bienestar, cuentas de gastos y cobertura de farmacia. Farmacia Planes de medicamentos seguros y convenientes que brindan acceso a medicamentos de especialidad y entrega a domicilio, apoyo y cuidado con medicamentos de especialidad y una red de miles de farmacias minoristas. Salud del comportamiento y bienestar Enfocados en la salud integral de las personas, los beneficios de salud mental y bienestar brindan acceso y referidos a recursos, servicios y proveedores certificados en salud mental dentro de una amplia red de salud del comportamiento. Cuidado de la visión Ofertas de planes de cobertura completa de la visión respaldados por una de las mayores redes especializadas de profesionales de cuidado de la visión de rutina del país1. Cuidado dental Más allá de una excelente cobertura dental, más de 17 millones de clientes 2 eligen los planes dentales de Cigna Healthcare porque tienen deducibles más bajos, mayores beneficios y opciones de cobertura que incluyen cuidado de la visión y audición combinados Cuentas de ahorros y gastos (HRA/HSA/FSA) Convenientes cuentas de gastos a través del plan del empleador que permiten a los empleados planificar y ahorrar dinero para una amplia variedad de gastos de cuidado de la salud.

## Planes individuales y familiares
Ofrecen a los clientes opciones de planes médicos de calidad con apoyo para el cuidado de la salud personalizado y costos bajos, así como acceso a opciones de farmacia, de cuidado médico, dental y de la visión.
Salud internacional Somos líderes en satisfacer las necesidades de quienes viajan internacionalmente. Nuestra fuerza laboral de más de 13,000 empleados brinda servicios a aproximadamente 9,000 relaciones con empleadores y unas 17 millones de relaciones con clientes.
## Salud internacional
Somos líderes en satisfacer las necesidades de quienes viajan internacionalmente. Nuestra fuerza laboral de más de 13,000 empleados brinda servicios a aproximadamente 9,000 relaciones con empleadores y unas 17 millones de relaciones con clientes.
Planes individuales y familiares Especializados en planes de seguro de salud a nivel mundial para personas que viajan internacionalmente e incluyen cobertura de cuidado de la salud, servicios de bienestar, apoyo para viajes internacionales en más de 200 países y jurisdicciones de todo el mundo. Planes del empleador Ofrecemos planes a pequeñas y medianas empresas, así como a grandes corporaciones, para empleados en el extranjero o empleadores que se encuentran en el extranjero que brindan seguros para sus empleados en su país de origen y desean proporcionarles características personalizadas, como asistencia multilingüe 24/7, programas de salud integral y herramientas digitales avanzadas. Salud para IGO y NGO Brinda apoyo vital a organizaciones intergubernamentales (IGO, sigla en inglés), organizaciones no gubernamentales (NGO, sigla en inglés) y empleados del gobierno en zonas de conflictos o países con infraestructura limitada en momentos de crisis, durante una enfermedad o una lesión.

Al seleccionar estos enlaces, saldrás de Cigna.com hacia otro sitio web que podría no ser un sitio web de Cigna Healthcare. Cigna Healthcare no puede controlar el contenido ni los enlaces de sitios web que no son de Cigna Healthcare. Detalles

The nationally-recognized accreditations by NCQA and URAC affirms the mission statement of Cigna Healthcare and Evernorth to improve the health and well-being of the individuals we serve through an integrated approach to quality and affordability in health care. This mission and approach is a common value shared across several organizations and programs within Cigna Healthcare and Evernorth. The dedication of Cigna Healthcare and Evernorth to the delivery of quality services is demonstrated by the continuous improvement of business processes through benchmarking against nationally recognized standards. Cigna Healthcare and Evernorth have received several URAC accreditations: Cigna Health Management, Inc. URAC Accreditations Cigna Health Management, Inc. URAC Case Management Expires 7/1/2028 By achieving URAC Accreditation, the case management program displays leadership through a commitment to quality and accountability. People coping with a wide range of health challenges, such as cancer, a transplant or a complicated pregnancy, benefit from the caring support provided to them by case managers. URAC accreditation ensures the delivery of quality services to our customers in managing transitions of care to reduce readmissions, improve and maintain their health. To verify the Case Management accreditation, please visit URAC.org Cigna Health Management, Inc. URAC Health Utilization Management Expires 7/1/2028 URAC accreditation provides a mark of distinction for organizations demonstrating their commitment to quality health care. Through the Health Utilization Management Accreditation, URAC affirms the use of evidence-based guidelines and specific review requirements that meet the demands of a changing health care system. The utilization management program is supported by reliable policies and procedures used during the review of health care services for medical necessity and appropriateness of care to help ensure easy access to care and correct administration of our customer’s benefits. To verify the Utilization Management accreditation, please visit URAC.org Cigna Health Management, Inc. URAC Pharmacy Benefit Management Expires 7/1/2028 Quality health care is crucial to our customers and it is important to be measured against national standards and undergo rigorous evaluation by an independent accrediting body, which validate our commitment to quality. Pharmacy benefit management ensures that contract terms and pricing are clear, so that individuals have access to the drugs and pharmacies they need to be healthy. To verify the Pharmacy Benefit Management accreditation, please visit URAC.org Evernorth URAC Accreditations Evernorth URAC Health Utilization Management Expires 9/1/2028 URAC accreditation provides a mark of distinction for organizations demonstrating their commitment to quality health care. Through the Health Utilization Management Accreditation of Evernorth, URAC affirms the use of evidence-based guidelines and specific review requirements that meet the demands of a changing health care system. The utilization management programs are supported by reliable policies and procedures used during the review of health care services for medical necessity and appropriateness of care to help ensure easy access to care and correct administration of our customer’s benefits. To verify the Utilization Management - behavioral accreditation of Evernorth, please visit URAC.org . About the National Committee for Quality Assurance NCQA is a private, non-profit organization dedicated to improving health care quality. NCQA accredits and certifies a wide range of health care organizations. It also recognizes clinicians and practices in key areas of performance. NCQA’s Healthcare Effectiveness Data and Information Set (HEDIS ®2 ) is the most widely used performance measurement tool in health care. NCQA is committed to providing health care quality information for consumers, purchasers, health care professionals and researchers. For more information, please visit NCQA.org . The following NCQA Accreditations and Certification underscores the commitment of Cigna Healthcare and Evernorth to excellence, quality, and affordable health care to the individuals we serve. Cigna Healthcare NCQA Accreditations Cigna Healthcare NCQA Health Plan Accreditation NCQA Health Plan Accreditation evaluates how well a health plan manages its entire delivery system, including physicians, hospitals and other facilities, as well as administrative services. Cigna Healthcare implements and manages numerous activities throughout the organization to ensure processes and opportunities are objectively and systematically monitored, and evaluated, to improve the quality and appropriateness of care and services. This ongoing quality oversight support the success of Cigna Healthcare in earning NCQA Health Plan Accreditation. To view the Health Plan Accreditation Report Card of Cigna Healthcare, please visit www.ncqa.org and select “Report Cards". Cigna Healthcare NCQA Physician Quality Certification The NCQA Physician Quality (PQ) Certification program evaluates how well health plans measure, and report the quality and cost of physicians and hospitals. Cigna Healthcare earned PQ certification for two physician quality measurement programs: Physician Quality and Cost Efficiency Displays and Cigna Healthcare Care Designation. This Cigna Healthcare program provides our customers with information about quality and cost, which may help them make better, more informed decisions when choosing physicians. To view the Physician Quality Certification Report Card of Cigna Healthcare, please visit www.ncqa.org and select “Report Cards”. Evernorth NCQA Accreditations Evernorth NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization Evernorth has earned full NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization (MBHO) Accreditation for how well it manages its entire delivery system, including physicians, hospitals and other facilities, as well as administrative services. NCQA reviews include rigorous on-site and off-site evaluations conducted by a team of physicians and managed care experts. Earning Full Managed Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation from NCQA is a powerful validation of the ongoing commitment of Evernorth to quality and demonstrates dedication to helping our customers. To view the Management Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation Report Card of Evernorth, please visit www.ncqa.org and select “Report Cards”. Related Resources The Cigna Group Milestones The Cigna Group Leadership Team 1 “Cigna Healthcare” refers to certain health care related operating subsidiaries of The Cigna Group ® and Evernorth Health, Inc. Such operating subsidiaries include Cigna Health and Life Insurance Company, Cigna Health Management, Inc., Evernorth Behavioral Health, Inc., Evernorth Care Solutions, Inc., Evernorth Direct Health, LLC and HMO or service company subsidiaries of Cigna Health Corporation and Cigna Dental Health, Inc. 2 HEDIS ® is a registered trademark of the National Committee for Quality Assurance (NCQA). pages.text:
Skip to main navigation
Skip to main content
Skip to footer
Para Individuos y familias Para Medicare Para Proveedores Para Agentes Para Empleadores Buscar English Buscar Menu Para acerca de Cigna Healthcare: Acreditación Comunícate con nosotras Redes sociales Ingresa a myCigna Para acerca de Cigna Healthcare: Acreditación Comunícate con nosotras Redes sociales Para Individuos y familias Para Medicare Para Proveedores Para Agentes Para Empleadores Inicio Acerca de Cigna Healthcare Acreditaciones de Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth Acreditaciones de Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth 1 Cigna Healthcare ® y Evernorth ® han obtenido acreditación y certificación del National Committee for Quality Assurance (NCQA) y la Utilization Review Accreditation Commission (URAC) en reconocimiento por nuestra larga trayectoria y nuestro fuerte compromiso con la calidad de los servicios para el cuidado de la salud. Las acreditaciones reconocidas a nivel nacional por NCQA y URAC afirman la declaración de la misión de Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth para mejorar la salud y el bienestar de las personas a quienes servimos a través un enfoque integrado de calidad y asequibilidad del cuidado de la salud. Esta misión y enfoque constituyen un principio común compartido por diversas organizaciones y programas dentro de Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth. La dedicación de Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth para brindar servicios de calidad queda demostrada con la mejora continua de los procesos de negocios mediante la evaluación comparativa frente a estándares reconocidos a nivel nacional. Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth recibieron varias acreditaciones de la URAC: Acreditaciones URAC de Cigna Health Management, Inc. URAC Case Management de Cigna Health Management, Inc. Vence el 1 de julio del 2028 Al lograr la acreditación URAC, el programa de administración de casos muestra liderazgo a través del compromiso con la calidad y la responsabilidad Las personas que afrontan un amplio rango de problemas de salud, como cáncer, un trasplante o un embarazo complicado, se benefician del apoyo en el cuidado que les brindan los administradores de casos. La acreditación URAC asegura la prestación de servicios de calidad a nuestros clientes en el manejo de las transiciones del cuidado a fin de reducir las readmisiones y mejorar y mantener su salud. Para verificar la Case Management Accreditation, visita URAC.org URAC Health Utilization Management de Cigna Health Management, Inc. Vence el 1 de julio del 2028 La acreditación URAC otorga una marca de distinción para las organizaciones que demuestran su compromiso de brindar un cuidado de la salud de calidad. Mediante la Health Utilization Management Accreditation, URAC afirma el uso de pautas basadas en evidencia y requisitos de revisión específicos que cumplen con las demandas de un sistema de cuidado de la salud cambiante. El programa de administración de utilización está respaldado por políticas y procedimientos confiables que se utilizan durante la revisión de los servicios para el cuidado de la salud para determinar la necesidad médica y si el cuidado es apropiado, y para asegurar el fácil acceso al cuidado y la administración correcta de los beneficios de nuestros clientes. Para verificar la Utilization Management Accreditation, visita URAC.org URAC Pharmacy Benefit Management de Cigna Health Management, Inc. Vence el 1 de julio del 2028 La calidad del cuidado de la salud es crucial para nuestros clientes; asimismo, es importante medir dicha calidad siguiendo las normas nacionales y que se someta a una evaluación rigurosa por parte de un organismo de acreditación independiente que valide nuestro compromiso con la calidad. La administración de beneficios de farmacia asegura que los términos de los contratos y los precios sean claros, de modo que las personas tengan acceso a los medicamentos y las farmacias que necesitan para estar saludables. Para verificar la Pharmacy Benefit Management Accreditation, visita URAC.org Acreditaciones de la URAC de Evernorth URAC Health Utilization Management de Evernorth Vence el 1 de septiembre del 2028 La acreditación URAC otorga una marca de distinción para las organizaciones que demuestran su compromiso de brindar un cuidado de la salud de calidad. Mediante la Health Utilization Management Accreditation de Evernorth, URAC afirma el uso de pautas basadas en evidencia y requisitos de revisión específicos que cumplen con las demandas de un sistema de cuidado de la salud cambiante. Los programas de administración de utilización están respaldados por políticas y procedimientos confiables que se utilizan durante la revisión de los servicios para el cuidado de la salud para determinar la necesidad médica y si el cuidado es apropiado, para asegurar el fácil acceso al cuidado y la administración correcta de los beneficios de nuestros clientes. Para verificar la Utilization Management - Behavioral Accreditation de Evernorth, visita URAC.org . Acerca del National Committee for Quality Assurance El National Committee for Quality Assurance (NCQA) es una organización privada sin fines de lucro dedicada a mejorar la calidad del cuidado de la salud. El NCQA acredita y certifica a un amplio rango de organizaciones del cuidado de la salud. También reconoce a los médicos y los consultorios en áreas clave de desempeño. El conjunto de datos e información sobre la efectividad del cuidado de la salud proporcionado por el NCQA (HEDIS ®2 ) es la herramienta de medición del desempeño más utilizada en el cuidado de la salud. El NCQA se compromete a brindar información sobre la calidad del cuidado de la salud a los clientes, compradores, profesionales del cuidado de la salud e investigadores. Para obtener más información, visita NCQA.org . Las siguientes acreditaciones y certificaciones del NCQA destacan el compromiso de Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth con la excelencia, la calidad y el cuidado de la salud asequible para las personas a quienes servimos. Acreditaciones del NCQA de Cigna Healthcare NCQA Health Plan Accreditation de Cigna Healthcare La NCQA Health Plan Accreditation evalúa si un plan de salud administra correctamente todo su sistema de prestación de servicios, lo que incluye a médicos, hospitales y otras instalaciones, así como a los servicios administrativos. Cigna Healthcare implementa y administra numerosas actividades en toda la organización para asegurar que los procesos y las oportunidades se controlen y evalúen de manera objetiva y sistemática para mejorar la calidad, y los cuidados y servicios apropiados. Esta supervisión continua de la calidad respalda el éxito de Cigna Healthcare para obtener la NCQA Health Plan Accreditation. Para ver el informe Health Plan Accreditation de Cigna Healthcare, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”. NCQA Physician Quality Certification de Cigna Healthcare El programa de NCQA Physician Quality (PQ) Certification evalúa qué tan bien los planes de salud miden e informan sobre la calidad y el costo de los médicos y hospitales. Cigna Healthcare obtuvo la PQ Certification para dos programas de medición de calidad de los médicos: Indicadores de rentabilidad y calidad de los médicos, y Designación de cuidado de Cigna. El programa de Cigna Healthcare ofrece a nuestros clientes información sobre la calidad y los costos para ayudarlos a tomar decisiones más adecuadas e informadas al elegir a sus médicos. Para ver el informe Physician Quality Certification de Cigna Healthcare, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”. Acreditaciones del NCQA de Evernorth NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization de Evernorth Evernorth ha obtenido la NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization (MBHO) Accreditation completa por la manera en que administra todo su sistema de prestación de servicios, incluidos médicos, hospitales y otras instalaciones, así como a los servicios administrativos. Las revisiones del NCQA incluyen evaluaciones rigurosas dentro y fuera del área de trabajo realizadas por un equipo de médicos y expertos en la atención médica administrada. La obtención de la Managed Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation completa del NCQA es una validación muy importante del compromiso continuo de Evernorth con la calidad y demuestra su dedicación a ayudar a nuestros clientes. Para ver el informe Management Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation de Evernorth, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”. ## Acerca del National Committee for Quality Assurance
El National Committee for Quality Assurance (NCQA) es una organización privada sin fines de lucro dedicada a mejorar la calidad del cuidado de la salud. El NCQA acredita y certifica a un amplio rango de organizaciones del cuidado de la salud. También reconoce a los médicos y los consultorios en áreas clave de desempeño. El conjunto de datos e información sobre la efectividad del cuidado de la salud proporcionado por el NCQA (HEDIS ®2 ) es la herramienta de medición del desempeño más utilizada en el cuidado de la salud. El NCQA se compromete a brindar información sobre la calidad del cuidado de la salud a los clientes, compradores, profesionales del cuidado de la salud e investigadores. Para obtener más información, visita NCQA.org .
Las siguientes acreditaciones y certificaciones del NCQA destacan el compromiso de Cigna Healthcare y Evernorth con la excelencia, la calidad y el cuidado de la salud asequible para las personas a quienes servimos.
Acreditaciones del NCQA de Cigna Healthcare
## Acreditaciones del NCQA de Cigna Healthcare
NCQA Health Plan Accreditation de Cigna Healthcare La NCQA Health Plan Accreditation evalúa si un plan de salud administra correctamente todo su sistema de prestación de servicios, lo que incluye a médicos, hospitales y otras instalaciones, así como a los servicios administrativos. Cigna Healthcare implementa y administra numerosas actividades en toda la organización para asegurar que los procesos y las oportunidades se controlen y evalúen de manera objetiva y sistemática para mejorar la calidad, y los cuidados y servicios apropiados. Esta supervisión continua de la calidad respalda el éxito de Cigna Healthcare para obtener la NCQA Health Plan Accreditation. Para ver el informe Health Plan Accreditation de Cigna Healthcare, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”.
## NCQA Health Plan Accreditation de Cigna Healthcare
La NCQA Health Plan Accreditation evalúa si un plan de salud administra correctamente todo su sistema de prestación de servicios, lo que incluye a médicos, hospitales y otras instalaciones, así como a los servicios administrativos. Cigna Healthcare implementa y administra numerosas actividades en toda la organización para asegurar que los procesos y las oportunidades se controlen y evalúen de manera objetiva y sistemática para mejorar la calidad, y los cuidados y servicios apropiados. Esta supervisión continua de la calidad respalda el éxito de Cigna Healthcare para obtener la NCQA Health Plan Accreditation. Para ver el informe Health Plan Accreditation de Cigna Healthcare, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”.
NCQA Physician Quality Certification de Cigna Healthcare El programa de NCQA Physician Quality (PQ) Certification evalúa qué tan bien los planes de salud miden e informan sobre la calidad y el costo de los médicos y hospitales. Cigna Healthcare obtuvo la PQ Certification para dos programas de medición de calidad de los médicos: Indicadores de rentabilidad y calidad de los médicos, y Designación de cuidado de Cigna. El programa de Cigna Healthcare ofrece a nuestros clientes información sobre la calidad y los costos para ayudarlos a tomar decisiones más adecuadas e informadas al elegir a sus médicos. Para ver el informe Physician Quality Certification de Cigna Healthcare, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”.
## NCQA Physician Quality Certification de Cigna Healthcare
El programa de NCQA Physician Quality (PQ) Certification evalúa qué tan bien los planes de salud miden e informan sobre la calidad y el costo de los médicos y hospitales. Cigna Healthcare obtuvo la PQ Certification para dos programas de medición de calidad de los médicos: Indicadores de rentabilidad y calidad de los médicos, y Designación de cuidado de Cigna. El programa de Cigna Healthcare ofrece a nuestros clientes información sobre la calidad y los costos para ayudarlos a tomar decisiones más adecuadas e informadas al elegir a sus médicos. Para ver el informe Physician Quality Certification de Cigna Healthcare, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”.
Acreditaciones del NCQA de Evernorth
## Acreditaciones del NCQA de Evernorth
NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization de Evernorth Evernorth ha obtenido la NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization (MBHO) Accreditation completa por la manera en que administra todo su sistema de prestación de servicios, incluidos médicos, hospitales y otras instalaciones, así como a los servicios administrativos. Las revisiones del NCQA incluyen evaluaciones rigurosas dentro y fuera del área de trabajo realizadas por un equipo de médicos y expertos en la atención médica administrada. La obtención de la Managed Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation completa del NCQA es una validación muy importante del compromiso continuo de Evernorth con la calidad y demuestra su dedicación a ayudar a nuestros clientes. Para ver el informe Management Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation de Evernorth, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”.
## NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization de Evernorth
Evernorth ha obtenido la NCQA Managed Behavioral Healthcare Organization (MBHO) Accreditation completa por la manera en que administra todo su sistema de prestación de servicios, incluidos médicos, hospitales y otras instalaciones, así como a los servicios administrativos. Las revisiones del NCQA incluyen evaluaciones rigurosas dentro y fuera del área de trabajo realizadas por un equipo de médicos y expertos en la atención médica administrada. La obtención de la Managed Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation completa del NCQA es una validación muy importante del compromiso continuo de Evernorth con la calidad y demuestra su dedicación a ayudar a nuestros clientes. Para ver el informe Management Behavioral Health Organization Accreditation de Evernorth, visita www.ncqa.org y selecciona “Report Cards”.

Giving and volunteering TI is committed to building stronger communities where we live and work around the world. Building stronger communities For decades, TI and the TI Foundation have worked to strengthen and improve the quality of life in our global site communities through well-considered and well-measured investments to improve the communities where we live and work, and engage TI employees through giving and volunteering programs. Our employees and our retirees regularly give and volunteer to help solve local needs. Their voice and community mindedness are supported by the TI Foundation by matching their monetary contributions up to $30,000 and the value of their volunteer hours up to $1,000 per year. Read more 305,000 hours volunteered globally in 2024 $12.5M TI Foundation matching gifts and volunteer matching in 2024 $370M given by the TI foundation since 1964 Where we invest Our highest philanthropic priority is education. We fund programs that provide high-quality STEM education for students in low-income school districts, primarily through increasing the effectiveness of teachers and principals.  We also fund human services programs that offer pathways to our neighbors who need essential social services.  In our headquarters city, we support arts organizations that express the multitude of cultures and peoples in our community.  The TI Foundation also matches our employees’ and retirees’ donations of dollars and time. To learn more about eligibility, click here . The belief that strong companies build strong communities, and strong communities build strong companies, is as ingrained in our company culture today as it was more than 90 years ago when we were founded. – Andy Smith | Texas Instruments director of Giving and Volunteering Volunteering Our employees are passionate about giving back and improving the quality of life in their communities. TI has more than 20 employee-led global community involvement teams and other civic-minded employees who work hard to solve local needs. At nearly 305,000 hours of employee and retiree time donated, the number of hours spent volunteering increased from 2023 to a value of $10.2 million in 2024. Where we invest
## Where we invest
Our highest philanthropic priority is education. We fund programs that provide high-quality STEM education for students in low-income school districts, primarily through increasing the effectiveness of teachers and principals.  We also fund human services programs that offer pathways to our neighbors who need essential social services.  In our headquarters city, we support arts organizations that express the multitude of cultures and peoples in our community.  The TI Foundation also matches our employees’ and retirees’ donations of dollars and time. To learn more about eligibility, click here .
The belief that strong companies build strong communities, and strong communities build strong companies, is as ingrained in our company culture today as it was more than 90 years ago when we were founded. – Andy Smith | Texas Instruments director of Giving and Volunteering Volunteering Our employees are passionate about giving back and improving the quality of life in their communities. TI has more than 20 employee-led global community involvement teams and other civic-minded employees who work hard to solve local needs. At nearly 305,000 hours of employee and retiree time donated, the number of hours spent volunteering increased from 2023 to a value of $10.2 million in 2024. In the U.S., the TI Foundation matches the value of employees’ volunteer hours up to $1,000 per year, which added nearly $500,000 of additional support for their favorite causes.

Home Contact us How can we help you? Please note that technical support is not available through our office locations. For help and information requests, please choose one of these options. Design support Our product applications engineers answer semiconductor design questions on the TI E2E™ design support forums, where you can search previously answered questions or ask a new question. Design support Other support questions For non-design-related questions such as ordering semiconductor parts and tools, contact our customer support center where you can open a support ticket, chat with us 24 hours a day, Monday through Friday; or call the TI support team. Customer support center Call the TI support team Calculator and education products Contact our TI-Cares™ customer support team for questions regarding our calculators and education products. Calculator support Suppliers Use the information and resources on this site to help you understand and meet our supplier expectations. Suppliers Media contacts Reach out to one of our media relations representatives to get the right information for your story. Media relations Investor relations Contact members of the investor relations team by mail, phone or email. Investor relations Website feedback Share your feedback to help us improve your TI.com experience. Website feedback Strategic partnerships Find information about startups, early stage companies and entrepreneurs working in the semiconductor space. Strategic partnerships TI ethics helpline Report concerns or ask questions to the Texas Instruments Ethics and Compliance Office. For support questions, please see contact information above. Eligible organizations Our highest philanthropic priority is education. We fund programs that provide high-quality STEM education for students in low-income school districts, primarily through increasing the effectiveness of teachers and principals.  We also fund human services programs that offer pathways to our neighbors who need essential social services.  In our headquarters city, we support arts organizations that express the multitude of cultures and peoples in our community.  The TI Foundation also matches our employees’ and retirees’ donations of dollars and time. The majority of our grants are made by invitation. Unsolicited proposals generally are not considered. Supported Public agencies and nonprofit organizations with tax-exempt status and under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code or as an instrumentality of a federal, state or local government as provided by Section 170(c)1 of the Code or the equivalent. Organizations must be based in one of our major site communities or provide services within those regions. Not supported Animal welfare organizations Courtesy advertising, including program books and yearbooks Fraternal or labor organizations Grants to individuals, including scholarships Hospitals, clinics, medical facilities Grants to individual schools or robotics teams (except robotics teams that have TI employee/retiree volunteers) Organizations focused on a particular medical condition (e.g., cancer, heart disease, diabetes) Organizations that discriminate based on race, color, religion, creed, disability, genetic information, national origin, gender, gender identity and expression, age, sexual orientation, marital status or veteran status Political activities, parties or candidates Private foundations or endowment funds Sectarian or denominational religious organizations Sporting events or teams, including golf tournaments Conventions or entertainment events Travel or tours Unrestricted gifts to national or international organizations How to apply Applications for eligible organizations with programs that fit within the above categories and descriptions: Grant application Sponsorship application Membership application For more information, email us at giving@ti.com .

Corporate citizenship
- Corporate citizenship
Environmental sustainability
- Environmental sustainability
Giving & volunteering
- Giving & volunteering
Public policy
- Public policy
Reporting & disclosures
- Reporting & disclosures
Corporate citizenship Our commitment to operate in a socially thoughtful and environmentally responsible manner. Our commitment to corporate citizenship We take pride in our commitment to being a good corporate citizen – including environmental, social and governance priorities – and our commitment to citizenship directly relates to our passion to create a better world by making electronics more affordable through semiconductors. With our ambitions guiding our decision making for the long-term and our products helping to create a better world, we are confident that our collective efforts will be impactful and long lasting. Read the executive summary Reducing our environmental impact We take great pride in being a good corporate citizen and have a long-standing commitment to responsible, sustainable manufacturing. We produced our first Corporate Citizenship Report in 2006, and we remain committed to our long-term environmental sustainability programs of conserving natural resources, reducing greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and mitigating climate change. Learn more about environmental sustainability Creating a better world As engineers, we are fortunate to work on exciting technology that helps our customers innovate to create a better world. Our semiconductor products are powering sustainable technology around the world, such as electric vehicles and renewable energy applications, and helping to make a positive impact in a growing number of ways. Learn more about what we do Ensuring a responsible supply chain Our ambitions and core values are integral to building a stronger company, and every TIer plays a critical role in upholding these principles and driving sustainable and responsible business practices throughout our supply chain, from policies and strategies related to environmental and social responsibility across our supply chain, to the responsible sourcing of minerals for our products. Learn about supply chain responsibility Building stronger communities One of our three ambitions is to be a company that we’re personally proud to be a part of and would want as our neighbor. For decades, TI and the TI Foundation have worked to build stronger communities where the company operates. And our employees are equally passionate about giving back and improving the quality of life in their communities. Learn more about giving and volunteering Working at TI We bring together 34,000 of the world’s smartest people – problem solvers known simply as TIers – who are committed to shaping the future of electronics in an environment in which every person can thrive. Learn more about careers at TI

Environmental sustainability Our programs and goals are focused on conserving natural resources, reducing consumption, and mitigating environmental impact. Creating a sustainable future We take pride in our commitment to being a good corporate citizen, with a long-standing commitment to responsible, sustainable manufacturing that includes programs and goals focused on conserving natural resources, reducing consumption, and mitigating environmental impact. 29% Reduction in Scope 1 & Scope 2 GHG emissions 25% Total electricity from renewable sources 31% Total water reused or recycled Environmental commitments Guided by multi-year goals, we are committed to reducing our environmental impact, and invests in hundreds of projects every year aimed at reducing energy, material and water consumption, and greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. These include using advanced manufacturing tools and technologies; signing multiyear solar and wind power contracts to deliver renewable electricity in Texas; and installing a solar roof at our site in Bangalore, India. Key environmental sustainability focus areas GHG emissions reduction We set greenhouse gas (GHG) emission goals to reduce environmental impacts and improve efficiencies. By 2025, TI aims to reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions by 25% (vs 2015 base year). Energy intensity per chip We are expanding our use of electricity from renewable sources. Our 300mm wafer fabs will be entirely powered by renewable electricity by 2025, with additional milestones to reach 100% in the U.S. by 2027, and 100% worldwide by 2030. Water conservation We have a particular focus on using water responsibly and efficiently. In 2024, we implemented water reduction projects that saved an annualized amount of water equal to 3.5% of our 2023 usage. Waste and material management We responsibly manage the use and disposal of materials and chemicals to protect the environment and reduce landfill waste. TI aims to divert 90% of materials from landfills to reduce environmental impacts. Powering sustainable technology We are fortunate to work on exciting technology that helps our customers innovate to create a better world. Our semiconductor products are powering innovation around the world, such as electric vehicles and renewable energy applications, and helping to make a positive impact in a growing number of ways. ## Environmental commitments
Guided by multi-year goals, we are committed to reducing our environmental impact, and invests in hundreds of projects every year aimed at reducing energy, material and water consumption, and greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. These include using advanced manufacturing tools and technologies; signing multiyear solar and wind power contracts to deliver renewable electricity in Texas; and installing a solar roof at our site in Bangalore, India.

Giving and volunteering TI is committed to building stronger communities where we live and work around the world. Building stronger communities For decades, TI and the TI Foundation have worked to strengthen and improve the quality of life in our global site communities through well-considered and well-measured investments to improve the communities where we live and work, and engage TI employees through giving and volunteering programs. Our employees and our retirees regularly give and volunteer to help solve local needs. Their voice and community mindedness are supported by the TI Foundation by matching their monetary contributions up to $30,000 and the value of their volunteer hours up to $1,000 per year. Read more 305,000 hours volunteered globally in 2024 $12.5M TI Foundation matching gifts and volunteer matching in 2024 $370M given by the TI foundation since 1964 Where we invest Our highest philanthropic priority is education. We fund programs that provide high-quality STEM education for students in low-income school districts, primarily through increasing the effectiveness of teachers and principals.  We also fund human services programs that offer pathways to our neighbors who need essential social services.  In our headquarters city, we support arts organizations that express the multitude of cultures and peoples in our community.  The TI Foundation also matches our employees’ and retirees’ donations of dollars and time. To learn more about eligibility, click here . The belief that strong companies build strong communities, and strong communities build strong companies, is as ingrained in our company culture today as it was more than 90 years ago when we were founded. – Andy Smith | Texas Instruments director of Giving and Volunteering Volunteering Our employees are passionate about giving back and improving the quality of life in their communities. TI has more than 20 employee-led global community involvement teams and other civic-minded employees who work hard to solve local needs. At nearly 305,000 hours of employee and retiree time donated, the number of hours spent volunteering increased from 2023 to a value of $10.2 million in 2024. In the U.S., the TI Foundation matches the value of employees’ volunteer hours up to $1,000 per year, which added nearly $500,000 of additional support for their favorite causes. 3 SEP 2025 | COMPANY BLOG Building stronger communities worldwide: TIers uphold a long-standing commitment to giving back From student mentorship to emergency relief, TI volunteers are improving the communities where they live and work Read more

Where we invest
## Where we invest
Our highest philanthropic priority is education. We fund programs that provide high-quality STEM education for students in low-income school districts, primarily through increasing the effectiveness of teachers and principals.  We also fund human services programs that offer pathways to our neighbors who need essential social services.  In our headquarters city, we support arts organizations that express the multitude of cultures and peoples in our community.  The TI Foundation also matches our employees’ and retirees’ donations of dollars and time. To learn more about eligibility, click here .
The belief that strong companies build strong communities, and strong communities build strong companies, is as ingrained in our company culture today as it was more than 90 years ago when we were founded. – Andy Smith | Texas Instruments director of Giving and Volunteering Volunteering Our employees are passionate about giving back and improving the quality of life in their communities. TI has more than 20 employee-led global community involvement teams and other civic-minded employees who work hard to solve local needs. At nearly 305,000 hours of employee and retiree time donated, the number of hours spent volunteering increased from 2023 to a value of $10.2 million in 2024. In the U.S., the TI Foundation matches the value of employees’ volunteer hours up to $1,000 per year, which added nearly $500,000 of additional support for their favorite causes.

Public policy Texas Instruments is a global semiconductor company that designs, manufactures and sells analog and embedded processing chips for markets such as industrial, automotive, personal electronics, enterprise systems and communications equipment. Our passion is to create a better world by making electronics more affordable through semiconductors. To accomplish this, we engage with stakeholders around the world to advocate for policies at the local, state, national and international levels of government, which facilitate growth and innovation and reflect our ambitions and values . Our specific policy interests include: Tax We support tax policies that recognize the semiconductor industry is global, capital-intensive and focused on research and development. Worldwide, we to seek to ensure tax policies are competitive, predictable and transparent. Trade We support trade policies that enhance supply chain resilience, promote fair competition and ensure the seamless flow of goods and services around the world. We work with governments to encourage agreements and policies that lower costs and remove barriers to trade and set high standards for intellectual property protection. Talent Our ability to compete, innovate and succeed relies on our ability to grow, hire and retain top talent at our sites around the world. Our advocacy focuses on policies that support science, technology, engineering and mathematics education programs, as well as workforce development initiatives designed to help meet future industry demands. Innovation We support policies that enable long-term investment in research and development and provide funding for scientific research programs at all levels of government, in universities and through public-private partnerships. Manufacturing We support policies that help build strong semiconductor supply chains and ensure reliable, sustainable, cost-effective supplies of water and energy. Additionally, we support regulatory frameworks and incentives that keep our manufacturing sites globally competitive.

Who we are In all we do, we are guided by our ambitions and values. Our ambitions represent what we desire and are determined to achieve; our values define who we are and how we behave. Learn more

Worldwide manufacturing Building the next era of semiconductor manufacturing Delivering geopolitically dependable supply Designing and manufacturing innovative products has been at the core of our business for decades. We operate 15 sites around the globe, including wafer fabs, assembly and test factories, and bump and probe facilities, in addition to strategically located product distribution centers. We are expanding our internal operations – building on decades of proven and reliable manufacturing expertise – to provide the assurance of supply our customers need, to get products where and when they need them. What sets us apart Support for growth We’re expanding our global manufacturing footprint with strategic investments in 300mm wafer fabs to support the capacity our customers will need for decades to come. Assembly and test factories and product distribution centers are undergoing continuous expansion and automation. Learn more Control of our supply Our internal wafer manufacturing and assembly and test operations are growing to support more than 95% of our production by 2030. This expanded footprint will give us control over our own supply to meet current and future demands. Learn more Owning our process technologies We’re investing and increasing capacity in 45 to 130nm nodes to meet the critical and long-term need for essential chips. We develop and own our process technologies to optimize products for price and performance. Learn more Sustainable manufacturing We have a long-standing commitment to responsible, sustainable manufacturing, including reusing or recycling water and 90% of our waste materials. Our new 300mm factories are designed to meet LEED Gold standards and will be powered by 100% renewable electricity. Learn more 17 DEC 2025 | COMPANY BLOG The future starts with the first: Our newest 300mm wafer fab is in production The journey to first production in Sherman, Texas marks an important milestone in TI’s legacy of firsts as we build the technology the world relies on today and dreams of tomorrow Read more 15 worldwide manufacturing sites 50B+ chips manufactured per year 95% of manufacturing internal by 2030 100% renewable electricity worldwide by 2030 300mm wafer fabs 300mm wafer fabs are the most efficient high-volume wafer factories in the world. The 300-millimeter (or 12-inch) wafer is the largest and most advanced diameter size for silicon wafers – able to hold millions of individual semiconductor chips. Our 300mm wafer fabs will produce more chips per wafer with advanced equipment and fully automated manufacturing flows for maximum efficiency. Sherman, Texas (SM1, SM2, SM3, SM4) Announced in November 2021, the site has the potential for four fabs operating as one site to meet demand over time. The first fab, SM1 is open and in production and construction is complete on the second fab, SM2. Read about Sherman Lehi, Utah (LFAB1, LFAB2) LFAB was purchased in 2021 and began 300mm wafer production in 2022. Announced in February 2023, a second 300mm semiconductor wafer fab is under construction on the site and will connect to the existing fab. Read about Lehi Richardson, Texas (RFAB1, RFAB2) RFAB opened in 2009 as the world’s first 300mm analog wafer fab. A second 300mm wafer fab connected to the first fab started production in 2022. Read about Richardson An inside look Ever wonder how the tiny chips powering your devices are made? Take a peek inside one of our 300mm wafer fabs and explore the three levels of this high-tech facility, where millions of chips are manufactured daily. Click through the image to learn more about where semiconductor chips are made. Fan deck level The top level of the fab contains the specialized fan systems that purify the air and maintain consistent temperature and humidity. The equipment pumps the clean air down into the fab. arrow-right Take a virtual tour of the fab Cleanroom level The cleanroom is where semiconductor chips are made. Thousands of the world’s most sophisticated and complex machines, called “tools” take bare silicon wafers through hundreds of process steps to create millions of chips every day. Cleanroom employees wear “bunny suits,” designed to protect the wafers from lint, hair, oil or even flakes of skin. arrow-right Take a virtual tour of the fab Subfab level The bottom level of the fab houses the pumps, power cabinets, utility pipes and other equipment that power the tools in the cleanroom. The complicated network of pipes running through the ceiling into the clean room floor through a series of holes called a “waffle table.” This allows us to bring essential elements like water, chemicals and gases into the fab. arrow-right Take a virtual tour of the fab Fan deck level Cleanroom level Subfab level A flexible supply chain We have owned and operated wafer fabs around the world for decades – producing high-quality and reliable chips. With increased investments to automate and modernize our existing fabs, we are able to efficiently manufacture billions of foundational semiconductors now and in the future. Coupled with our new 300mm capacity expansion projects, we can provide better assurance of the supply our customers need. We own and operate assembly and test facilities (A/Ts) around the world, where the individual semiconductor chip is separated from the wafer and assembled, packaged and tested. The back-end manufacturing process is a key part of our internal manufacturing operations and undergoing continuous expansion, modernization and automation to support customer demand. arrow-right Learn more Once TI products are packaged and tested, they are shipped to one of our product distribution centers (PDCs), which are strategically located around the globe to provide fast, reliable delivery. We are continuously growing our PDC network with additional locations and automating systems to increase productivity. arrow-right Buying with TI A core element of our strategy is to grow capacity across our global manufacturing footprint and continue to advance our processes to ensure high quality devices. Our goal is to provide customers with geopolitical dependability and diverse sourcing options they need to support their growth for decades to come. – Mohammad Yunus | Texas Instruments senior vice president, Technology and Manufacturing Group Expanding capacity with assembly & test sites TI operates seven state-of-the-art assembly and test sites globally that play a vital role in transforming semiconductor wafers into finished chips. Our focus is on modernization, automation, and capacity expansion of our back-end manufacturing. Learn more Recent news Texas Instruments begins production at its newest 300mm semiconductor manufacturing facility in Sherman, Texas December 17, 2025 - Texas Instruments (TI) today announced the start of production at its newest semiconductor fab in Sherman, TX, just three and a half years after breaking ground. Read more Texas Instruments opens its second assembly and test factory in Melaka, Malaysia November 6, 2025 – The new factory, which connects to the company’s existing site, will assemble and test billions of chips annually. Read more Industry-leading companies strengthen partnerships with TI June 18, 2025 - TI’s $60 billion investment in U.S. manufacturing and it’s technology leadership support Apple, Ford, Medtronic, NVIDIA and SpaceX to build what’s next in critical applications. Read more Media contact For media questions, please reach out to mediarelations@ti.com . Press kits Click below to access TI manufacturing images, video b-roll and fact sheets. View more

## Building the next era of semiconductor manufacturing
Delivering geopolitically dependable supply Designing and manufacturing innovative products has been at the core of our business for decades. We operate 15 sites around the globe, including wafer fabs, assembly and test factories, and bump and probe facilities, in addition to strategically located product distribution centers. We are expanding our internal operations – building on decades of proven and reliable manufacturing expertise – to provide the assurance of supply our customers need, to get products where and when they need them.
## Delivering geopolitically dependable supply
Designing and manufacturing innovative products has been at the core of our business for decades. We operate 15 sites around the globe, including wafer fabs, assembly and test factories, and bump and probe facilities, in addition to strategically located product distribution centers. We are expanding our internal operations – building on decades of proven and reliable manufacturing expertise – to provide the assurance of supply our customers need, to get products where and when they need them.
What sets us apart Support for growth We’re expanding our global manufacturing footprint with strategic investments in 300mm wafer fabs to support the capacity our customers will need for decades to come. Assembly and test factories and product distribution centers are undergoing continuous expansion and automation. Learn more Control of our supply Our internal wafer manufacturing and assembly and test operations are growing to support more than 95% of our production by 2030. This expanded footprint will give us control over our own supply to meet current and future demands. Learn more Owning our process technologies We’re investing and increasing capacity in 45 to 130nm nodes to meet the critical and long-term need for essential chips. We develop and own our process technologies to optimize products for price and performance. Learn more Sustainable manufacturing We have a long-standing commitment to responsible, sustainable manufacturing, including reusing or recycling water and 90% of our waste materials. Our new 300mm factories are designed to meet LEED Gold standards and will be powered by 100% renewable electricity. We own and operate assembly and test facilities (A/Ts) around the world, where the individual semiconductor chip is separated from the wafer and assembled, packaged and tested.
